'''Ithila''' was [[Hapan]] woman of middle age who was lean and beautiful except for a pattern of burn scars on the right side of her face she suffered as a result of an explosion on board a [[Hapan Battle Dragon]] she served on during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Her scars were due to an allergic reaction to [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], keeping her from recovering fully and forcing her into a self-imposed exilement from the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. She would go on to become a mercenary and serve on board the [[Poison Moon (starship)|''Poison Moon'']] as a sensor officer and served under [[Dician]] who, unbeknownst to her, was a Sith.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Omen (audiobook)}} {{Flash}}
